prose:
**Frontier orbital energies of ethylene**  
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase.  
Geometry: user-supplied ethylene.xyz; single-point at this geometry (DFT//user).  
Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell).  
SCF converged in 6 cycles; no engine warnings were reported.

Results (eV):  
• HOMO = −7.6155818 eV  
• LUMO = −0.17986527 eV  
• HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV  
Total electronic energy = −2139.4540556281104 eV (−78.623486 Eh).

Reproducibility  
Command executed (see `cli_invocation` in JSON):  
`frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 ethylene.xyz --out ethylene_frontier_b3lyp.json`  
A live PySCF log was streamed to a `frontier_*.out` file in the working directory; consult that file for full SCF details.  
Output JSON: `ethylene_frontier_b3lyp.json`.

No warnings were produced by the engine.  
Integrity check: trustworthy = true.  
Provenance: computed.
